titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Newcomer's Club Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:54

did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, notebooks, membership lists, meeting minutes, scrapbooks, and printed matter of the Yale Newcomer's Club.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 40 (YRG 40), Records of Yale clubs, societies, and organizations.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Newcomer's Club Records (RU 71). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, notebooks, membership lists, meeting minutes, scrapbooks, and printed matter of the Yale Newcomer's Club.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Printed matter: Yale and New Haven Information
Yale University Women's Organization and University Council
Records of the Hospitality Chairperson: includes information about social functions, newsletters, minutes and financial statements:
